Comfortable Amenities: The hotel features family rooms, free on-site parking, and a paid shuttle service. Additional facilities include an outdoor seating area, picnic area, bicycle parking, and full-day security.
Dining Experience: A traditional restaurant serves local cuisine with halal, kosher, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Breakfast includes fresh pastries, pancakes, and cheese.
Prime Location: Located 132 km from Tbilisi International Airport, the hotel is a 19-minute walk from Ilia Chavchavadze State Museum.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Eclipse Winery Boutique Hotel in Kvareli offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and garden views. Each room includes a kitchen, work desk, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the terrace or bar, enjoy the outdoor fireplace, and utilise the shared kitchen. Additional amenities include an indoor play area, outdoor seating, and barbecue facilities.
Delicious Breakfast: A local speciality breakfast with cheese is served daily, providing a perfect start to the day.
Convenient Location: Located 128 km from Tbilisi International Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Ilia Chavchavadze State Museum (10 km) and Gremi Citadel (24 km). Guests appreciate the peaceful nature-centric environment.

hotels.description_en:
Featuring a full spa and wellness centre, this hotel is nestled between the Kvareli Lake and the Alazany Valley. Kvareli Lake Resort is located in Kvareli.
All accommodation at Kvareli Lake Resort comes complete with satellite TV, air conditioning and a minibar. Each room has a private bathroom providing free toiletries, slippers and a hairdryer.
Guests are welcome to dine in the hotel restaurant and half-board options are available. Additonally, there is a bar on site as well as barbecue facilities and vending machines.
Guests can relax in the outdoor pool or make use of the fitness centre. Alternatively, hiking and fishing are popular in the area. Guests can borrow bikes from Kvareli Lake Resort free of charge.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.
